event_tagline: AI-native agents for the modern finance stack

main_tracks.name: Reactive Finance Agents
main_tracks.summary: Triggered by user intent or inbound events.
main_tracks.description: Agents triggered by user intent or inbound events — answer ledger questions, triage invoices, reconcile on demand, co-pilot bookkeeping workflows.
examples: Slack bot that answers "what's our cash runway?"
Email parser that triages AP invoices into Xero

main_tracks.name: Proactive Finance Agents
main_tracks.description: Always-on agents that monitor, anticipate, and act — continuous VAT & audit checks, anomaly detection, receipt capture, cash-flow foresight, closes on schedule.
examples: Continuous VAT validator that flags filings before HMRC does
Anomaly detector scanning the ledger every 10 minutes
Auto-close agent that books recurring journals on schedule

criteria.name: Concrete Workflow Value
criteria.description: Does it replace or compress a real finance workflow a human does today?

criteria.name: Track Fit
criteria.description: How purely does the submission embody its chosen track (reactive vs proactive)?

criteria.name: Reliability & Verification
criteria.description: Evals, guardrails, audit trails, human-in-the-loop checkpoints.

criteria.name: Technical Execution
criteria.description: Architecture quality, tool design, latency, integrations that actually work.

criteria.name: Demo Clarity
criteria.description: Can the judge, in 90 seconds, see exactly what this agent does and why it matters?

judge_bonus_bucket.name: Judge Bonus Bucket
judge_bonus_bucket.description: Judges may allocate up to 30 total bonus points across one or more side quests.

side_quests.name: Best Cursor-Native Workflow
side_quests.blurb: The cleanest end-to-end Cursor → code → agent pipeline.

side_quests.name: Best Developer Tool
side_quests.blurb: Something accountants or devs on finance teams would actually install.

side_quests.name: Best Reliability System
side_quests.blurb: Evals, traces, fallbacks, repro tests — reliability as first-class design.

side_quests.name: Most Technically Ambitious
side_quests.blurb: Hardest thing attempted — bonus for nailing it.

side_quests.name: Best Demo
side_quests.blurb: The demo that makes a judge lean forward.

prizes.name: 1st place
prizes.description: Top-scoring submission across both tracks. Cash and half a year on Cursor's top tier.

prizes.name: 3rd place
prizes.description: Third highest score across both tracks.
